message:
perf(search): add summary projection fast-path for 5-field hit filtering

Introduce a dedicated fast-path branch in output_robot_results for the
"summary" projection that requests exactly source_path, line_number,
agent, title, and score. This mirrors the existing minimal_projection
optimization (3-field) but covers the common 5-field summary use case.

Changes:
- Extract all_fields_requested binding earlier for logical variable
  ordering, before passthrough_all_fields assignment
- Add summary_projection detection matching the 5-field signature
- Add else-if branch constructing a pre-allocated Map::with_capacity(5)
  directly from hit fields, bypassing full serialization + filtering
- Guard with !needs_truncation to fall through to generic pipeline
  when truncation budgets are configured

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
